description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to master and tags starting with v*. The workflow has four jobs: test-linux, package-appImage, package-rpm, and package-deb. The test-linux job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt and dependencies, and runs tests. The other jobs depend on test-linux and package the application into different formats (AppImage, RPM, DEB) on different ubuntu environments, uploading artifacts and releases.
